description: A transportation planner in Bologna's traffic management center needs to simulate a temporary road closure due to emergency utility repairs in the Acosta district. Identify the road segment to be closed from /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/closure_target.txt. Create a SUMO rerouter additional file at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/road_closure.add.xml to implement the closure for the full simulation period (0-86400s). Execute a headless simulation using a modified configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/closure_run.sumocfg that incorporates the rerouter, ignores route errors, and saves trip information to closure_tripinfo.xml. Generate a summary report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/closure_report.txt comparing the simulation results against the baseline_tripinfo.xml found in the scenario directory. The report must contain colon-separated key-value pairs for: closed_edge, baseline_trips, closure_trips, baseline_avg_duration, closure_avg_duration, duration_change_seconds, and duration_change_percent. Calculate trip counts and average durations from the tripinfo XML files.
